topics.title: George Takei Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio hosts George Takei to discuss his role as a show announcer, his personal experiences with substance use in the past, and the history of the Star Trek franchise.

topics.title: Star Trek Production and Media Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses low-budget live-action Star Trek webcasts featuring George Takei, his experiences at a William Shatner roast, and the fallout from a New York Post article regarding host Howard Stern's career.

topics.title: Media Conflict and Football Pool Updates
topics.summary: The studio addresses a reporter's termination following a conflict of interest, discusses potential stock manipulation in satellite radio by Clear Channel, and reviews the current standings of a listener football pool.

topics.title: Journalistic Ethics and Media Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses the firing of a reporter for a conflict of interest, the inaccuracy of media reports regarding Howard Stern’s career status, and the distinction between professional journalism and personal vendettas.

topics.title: Steven Tyler Health and Artie Lange Dating
topics.summary: The studio discusses Steven Tyler’s battle with hepatitis C before transitioning to a segment where a caller shares her history of addiction and incarceration while seeking a date with Artie Lange.

topics.title: Ronnie's Tattoos and Auction Robe
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Ronnie discusses his panther tattoo, the risks of getting untranslated Chinese characters, and an auction of a promotional bathrobe for charity.

topics.title: Insane Clown Posse Reunion and Rehab
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Violent J and Shaggy 2 Dope of the Insane Clown Posse, who discuss their long-standing partnership, rumors of a breakup, and Shaggy's experience in rehab.

topics.title: Insane Clown Posse Interview and Wrestling Plans
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Insane Clown Posse regarding their sobriety, past conflicts with Sharon Osbourne, and upcoming appearances in professional wrestling.

topics.title: Insane Clown Posse Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with Insane Clown Posse members regarding their wrestling aspirations, tour details, and personal anecdotes about past altercations.

topics.title: Insane Clown Posse Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with members of Insane Clown Posse regarding their past experiences, musical career, and upcoming tour.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey and Howard Stern Media Comparisons
topics.summary: The studio discusses the differences between Oprah Winfrey’s transition to satellite radio and Howard Stern's move, while also featuring a guest appearance by Butch Patrick of The Munsters.

topics.title: Butch Patrick and The Munsters Legacy
topics.summary: The studio features Butch Patrick and other guests discussing his career in The Munsters, the upcoming release of his book, and various anecdotes involving fellow actors.

topics.title: Steve O and his father's background
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Steve O’s family history, his father's executive roles at Nabisco and Pepsi-Cola, and various anecdotes involving the Munsters and local news updates.

topics.title: Radio Industry Transitions and Content Freedom
topics.summary: The show features a cross-network conversation between Howard Stern and Adam Carolla regarding the differences between satellite and terrestrial radio, the impact of censorship on content, and the growth of their respective platforms.

topics.title: Radio Industry Transitions and Media Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses the transition of talent from terrestrial radio to satellite platforms, the impact of censorship on comedy, and various media reports regarding public figures.

topics.title: Upcoming Show and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the development of Jackie Martling's new show, reports on media industry layoffs at Access Hollywood, and covers news regarding HIV testing recommendations and a spinach-related E. coli outbreak.

topics.title: News Roundup of Crime and Global Politics
topics.summary: The show covers a series of violent crimes involving children, reports on the status of Osama bin Laden, Bill Clinton's defense against political criticism, Hugo Chavez's visit to the U.S., and updates on the Iraq War.
